description: render the hypothesis tree as an ASCII audit trail (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the tree or run config
renders each node with a status symbol, hypothesis, scores, and the M_best marker
useful for the final report and quick scans of what was tried
usage: Set RECORD_STORE pointing at an existing Arbor run. Output: status.txt. If no run exists in the store, an empty bootstrap run is created so there is a tree to render.
limitation: Read-only render only — no interpretation, no decisions.
